column5: Chose cross-encoder reranking over plain cosine similarity after human eval showed it caught intent mismatches
Cached top reranked results with a 10 minute TTL since recomputing per request tripled p95 latency
Pulled click history via a nightly batch instead of a real-time join that blew the 80ms rerank budget
Weighted recency with exponential decay instead of a hard cutoff that discarded still-predictive clicks
Stored per-user embeddings in a quantized 8-bit format so the table stays resident in memory
Abandoned online learning-to-rank: it destabilized rankings whenever a bot crawler skewed clicks
Abandoned a popularity fallback: cold-start recommendations were identical for every new visitor
User requirement: service must stay inside the VPC and never call a third-party ranking API
Discovered the mobile client truncates any response payload over 64 kilobytes
